positive: A stylized geometric celestial fox silhouette, sitting on a crescent moon and radiating subtle starlight. The fox has flowing, abstract tail elements designed with minimalist knotwork patterns. The background is a deep indigo void transitioning into sapphire at the edges. Emphasize clean lines, bold negative space, high contrast, and a vibrant, ethereal glow emanating from the core subject. Composition should be perfectly centered for apparel placement, with a strong, dynamic silhouette visible from all angles. Style: Modern vector art, linework illustration, celestial gothic aesthetic, high detail, graphic novel quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noise, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, signature, messy, cluttered, photo-realistic, gradient blur
